title: Implement Live Companion and Visual Truth vertical slice
goal: Implement provider-reference drift auditing, a receipt-bound companion release and HTTPS doctor, authenticated visual capture receipts and three Golden Board reference compositions in Schauwerk.

approval.note: The user explicitly authorized implementation and the public HTTPS/Miro Developer App path. Repository merge still requires a complete diff, green CI and diff-bound review. Provider mutations may target only exact allowlisted test resources and require readback.

acceptance.assertion: The capability audit reports observed live tools, official-reference tools, live/reference differences and adapter coverage as separate evidence layers.
acceptance.verifier: tests, live audit fixture and merged implementation

acceptance.assertion: A deterministic release manifest binds a verified companion build to an HTTPS app URL, expected scopes and non-secret Developer App identity, and a doctor validates deployed content and security headers fail-closed.

An authenticated provider capture is validated and receipt-bound to an exact repeatable board snapshot, image digest, dimensions and explicit authentication evidence; unauthenticated pages cannot pass.
Three intentionally distinct reference compositions cover system landscape, decision flow and narrative journey and pass deterministic quality and preview checks.
acceptance.verifier: fixtures, package checks and regression tests

acceptance.assertion: Public hosting, Developer App registration, team installation and authorization are verified by live readback or remain explicitly open without being inferred from local builds or MCP OAuth.
acceptance.verifier: deployment receipt or explicit blocked-gate receipt

acceptance.assertion: Tests, CI, full downloadable diff, head- and diff-bound review, mergeability and post-merge validation pass before verification.

metadata.block_reason: The repository implementation is merged and post-merge validated, but no authenticated public hosting credential is available and both scoped Miro browser profiles resolve to the signup page. Public HTTPS deployment, Developer App registration, team installation, Web SDK authorization and an authenticated Visual Truth capture therefore remain unevidenced.

blockers.evidence: Wrangler 4.111.0 reports not authenticated; no Cloudflare, Netlify or Vercel token is present in the execution environment.
blockers.required_resolution: Authenticate one approved hosting account and deploy the exact companion bundle with the required response headers.

blockers.evidence: Both SchauwerkWorkerProfile and SchauwerkEducationSnapshotProfile redirected the Developer Dashboard URL to https://miro.com/de/signup/.
blockers.required_resolution: Reauthenticate the scoped Miro education profile, then create/configure/install the Web SDK app and verify it in-board.

implementation_evidence.post_merge_validation: 711 tests plus Ruff, compileall and registry validation passed on f2a8c8281a3e01fff2dc6f9ad057d58ad45a28f8

satisfied_acceptance.companion-release: Merged release manifest, local verifier, fail-closed HTTPS doctor and explicit gate-status contract; actual public deployment remains blocked.
satisfied_acceptance.golden-boards: Three distinct system-landscape, decision-flow and narrative-journey compositions compile and preview with zero blockers.
satisfied_acceptance.merge-gates: Full patches, SHA-256 and sizes published; bound PASS reviews, green CI, mergeability and post-merge validation completed.
satisfied_acceptance.provider-drift: Merged and live-read: 33 observed tools, three documented tools absent live and five live tools absent from the reference; the live catalogue remains operational authority.
satisfied_acceptance.visual-truth: Merged strict PNG/JPEG/WebP receipt path with snapshot recomputation, allowlist/provider binding and negative-page rejection; actual authenticated capture remains blocked.

metadata.next_action: Authenticate an approved HTTPS host and the scoped Miro education profile; deploy and doctor the exact companion bundle, create/install the Developer App, run an authenticated in-board readback and create the first Visual Truth receipt.
